heading: Reimbursement of corporation from funds of Government agencies for services, losses, operating costs, or commodities purchased
label: 713a–9 Reimbursement of corporation from funds of Government agencies for services, losses, operating costs, or commodities purchased
text: Full reimbursement shall be made to the Commodity Credit Corporation for services performed, losses sustained, operating costs incurred, or commodities purchased or delivered to or on behalf of the Lend-Lease Administration, the Army or Navy, the Board of Economic Warfare, the Reconstruction Finance Corporation, or any other Government agency, from the appropriate funds of these agencies.
notes: Transfer of FunctionsLend-Lease Administration and Board of Economic Warfare, referred to in text, consolidated with Foreign Economic Administration by Ex. Ord. No. 9380, . Foreign Economic Administration subsequently terminated and functions of Lend-Lease Administration and Board of Economic Warfare transferred to Department of State pursuant to Ex. Ord. No. 9630, , 10 F.R. 12245, as amended by Ex. Ord. No. 9730, , 11 F.R. 5777.Sept. 25, 1943Sept. 27, 1945May 27, 1946

Exceptions From Transfer of FunctionsFor exception of functions of corporations of Department of Agriculture from transfer of functions to Secretary of Agriculture by Reorg. Plan No. 2 of 1953, see Exceptions From Transfer of Functions note set out under .section 712a of this title
